widgets_values: you can add any additional characteristics you want to see on you character
<- you can increase/decrease grow if you don't satisfied of mask
you can increase/decrease strength to play with consistency of reference

You are given an image.
Describe the scene in one concise, photorealistic sentence focusing on pose, environment, expression, and gaze.

Rules:

Include the head angle and pose (frontal, profile, slightly turned, tilted up/down, body posture if visible).

Mention the environment, lighting, or background if visible.

Include the person's facial expression (neutral, smiling, serious, mouth open/closed, etc.).

Include the gaze direction (looking forward, left, right, up, down, off-camera).

Keep it objective and visual.

Examples:

A woman faces slightly to the left with a calm, neutral expression and her head gently tilted down, her gaze directed leftward under soft indoor lighting.

A man in a frontal pose with a faint smile looks straight ahead, captured in natural daylight with neutral lighting.

A woman in profile with a focused, serious expression gazes upward against a blurred outdoor background.

A person leans slightly forward with their head tilted to the right, looking down with a thoughtful expression under warm evening light.

A man stands outdoors facing slightly left with a relaxed half-smile and gaze forward in bright daylight with soft shadows.

A person faces frontally with a serious expression, looking slightly upward under diffused white indoor light.

A woman tilts her head slightly upward with a confident expression, eyes directed forward, captured under natural morning light.

A person sits upright with their head slightly turned to the left, smiling gently while looking forward in a softly lit room.

A person leans back slightly with their head tilted to the side, looking downward with a calm, relaxed expression illuminated by window light.

A man in a three-quarter pose faces slightly right with a serious expression, looking off-camera, standing against a neutral background with cool studio lighting.

DO NOT caption make up, hairstyle, haircut or hair color
Return only the prompt text itself. No explanations or formatting.

You are given an image.
Describe the person's visual characteristics in one concise, photorealistic sentence.

Rules:

Mention general skin tone (fair, medium, dark, etc.).

Mention hairstyle and haircut (length—short/medium/long, texture—straight/wavy/curly/coily, style details—layered, bangs, slicked back, etc.).

Include eye color and appearance (bright, soft, intense, etc.).

Avoid describing identity-level details beyond these visual characteristics.

Keep it objective and visual.

Examples:

A woman with fair skin, long straight dark hair, and bright blue eyes.

A man with medium skin tone, short dark hair in a cropped style, and warm brown eyes.

A woman with dark skin, short coily hair, and expressive dark brown eyes.

A person with fair skin, long blonde hair styled in waves, and pale green eyes.

A man with medium-toned skin, medium-length textured dark brown hair, and intense dark eyes.

A person with fair skin, shoulder-length red hair with side-swept bangs, and cool gray eyes.

A woman with dark skin, voluminous curly hair, and bright, confident dark eyes.

A man with fair skin, short light brown hair in a modern cut, and warm hazel eyes.

A person with medium skin tone, long dark hair styled straight, and soft brown eyes.

A person with fair skin, medium-length blonde hair with soft waves, and light blue eyes with a gentle gaze.
Return only the prompt text itself. No explanations or formatting.
Photography. A young woman wearing a black suit, standing in a room

Describe the key features of the input image (color, shape, size, texture, objects, background), then explain how the user's text instruction should alter or modify the image. Generate a new image that meets the user's requirements while maintaining consistency with the original input where appropriate.

ClownOptions Detail Boost: is not necessary. You can play with methods to get some extra details. 

ClownsharkKSampler: works well w sigmoid_offset/bong_tanget
                    you can increase denoise to get stronger consistence of target head. but the best results are                    on 0.70-0.73
